author: junjieim
description: Mirror blocks between notes with mirror-to and mirror-from commands. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Junjie
manifest.description: Mirror blocks between notes with mirror-to and mirror-from commands.
manifest.name: Better Quote

name: Better Quote

releases.author: junjieim
releases.description:
Initial public release of better-quote.

Features
- Add /mirror-to command to append a block ID to the current line and mirror it to another note.
- Add /mirror-from command to search blocks across the vault and embed a selected block into the current note.
- Use per-file quote numbering for block IDs.
- Reuse Obsidian suggestion modals for file picking and block search.

Assets
- manifest.json
- main.js
- styles.css
